# Acme Corp Annual Financial Report 2024

## Revenue Summary
Acme Corp reported total annual revenue of 145 million dollars in fiscal year 2024,
representing a 22 percent increase over the prior year. Recurring subscription revenue
accounted for 68 percent of total revenue, reflecting the company's continued shift
toward a software-as-a-service business model.

## Revenue by Segment
The enterprise segment generated 92 million dollars in revenue, while the small and
medium business segment contributed 41 million dollars. The remaining 12 million
dollars came from professional services and one-time licensing arrangements.

## Operating Expenses
Total operating expenses were 98 million dollars. Research and development spending
rose to 31 million dollars, the largest single expense category, underscoring the
company's investment in its artificial intelligence product line.

## Profitability
Net income for fiscal year 2024 was 27 million dollars, yielding a net profit margin
of approximately 18.6 percent. Gross margin improved to 74 percent, up from 70 percent
in the previous fiscal year.

## Cash Position
The company ended the fiscal year with 63 million dollars in cash and cash
equivalents, with no outstanding long-term debt. Free cash flow for the year was
34 million dollars.

## Outlook
Management projects revenue growth of 18 to 24 percent for fiscal year 2025, driven
primarily by expansion of the enterprise subscription base and international markets.
